scope: Owner auth persistence and standard/debug/preview route gate parity

unit_contracts.command: node --test --experimental-strip-types lib\api\client.test.ts lib\editor\readiness.test.ts lib\presence\render\resolver.test.ts lib\presence\widgets\registry.test.ts lib\presence\option-packs\registry.test.ts lib\presence\typography\registry.test.ts lib\editor\canvasModel.test.ts lib\editor\canvasMutations.test.ts lib\editor\assetValidator.test.ts lib\editor\diffEngine.test.ts lib\api\editor.test.ts lib\api\presenceGraph.test.ts

browser_regressions.command: npx playwright test tests/e2e/canvas-builder-auth-gate-session.spec.ts tests/e2e/canvas-builder-preview-publish-p0.spec.ts tests/e2e/canvas-builder-parity.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-canvas-direct-manipulation.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-studio-editor.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-pass-paths.spec.ts --workers=1 --retries=0 --reporter=list

hosted_required: Fresh incognito owner sign-in exactly once.
Standard editor and hard refresh render without debug query.
Debug editor renders the same Canvas plus display-only diagnostics.
Standard private preview renders the saved draft.
Save, explicit publish, public update, RoomKey check, and cleanup complete.
